quests.description:
Glubgrath
Skylight Grasslands, Gemini Lakes.

Go to Windstone Village to the east.

quests.name: Lost Signal
quests.description:
Lyra Thornfeld
Westwinds Woods, Valley of sins infistation

Head north west to the Greystone Ruins and place a radio. Continue north west and find the second anomaly.

quests.name: Corruption Clean-Up
quests.description:
Morick Voss
Westwind Woods, Valley of sins infestation.

Kill some Occultists around the area.

quests.name: The Case Against Triton
quests.description:
Brawny Barrelbuckle
Windstone Village, Street gym.

Find Roderick 'DarkSpike' Thinklatch in Windstone Village.

quests.name: Desperate for Dendroid
quests.description:
Marigold Thornbuckle
Goldenfield, Edge farm.

Head south to the house on the edge of the fields and find the cookbook.

quests.name: Diamond eyes
quests.description:
Durzo "Dicey" Dunwaddle
Windstone Village, Guard's place: east.

Use the items around the Dr. to help him create a beautiful set of eyes for Dwarfaton.

quests.name: The Art of Deception
quests.description:
Hank Thornbuckle
Goldenfield, Edge farm.

Head to the Goldenfield Bank.

quests.name: A Taste of the Unusual
quests.description:
Erwin "Bacon King" Braux
Riverrise, Butchery district.

Head to the abandoned village south or the railway depot and swamp to the east for scrags.

quests.name: Something Suspicious
quests.description:
Alexander Stones
Westwind Woods, Old Quarry overlooking platform.

Search the mine to the south, nearby Grizzle Ironfoot for the notes.

quests.name: Seasoned delicacy
quests.description:
Triton
Windreach Woods, Lake house.

Find Thorin in Windstone Village to the east, past the lake.

quests.name: Mounting Evidence
quests.description:
Roderick "DarkSpike" Thinklatch
Windstone Village, Guard's place: east.

Search the Windstone Village Pier on the west side of the village.

quests.name: Unveiling Dark Secrets
quests.description:
Alexander Stones
Westwind Woods, Old Quarry overlooking platform.

Search for an abandoned house south of Varkus.

quests.name: Price of Punishment
quests.description:
Ace
Riverrise, City Center.

Search for boars in the woods west of Riverrise, past the fields.

quests.name: Questionable Evidence
quests.description:
Quaridor Vex
Windstone Village, Guard's place: west.

Look at the docks in Windreach Woods for a vase with the mask. You can also search south of here in the trees. Just don't go past the road south.

quests.name: Eggcellent substitution
quests.description:
Triton
Windreach Woods, Lake house.

Kill imps in the Windreach Woods and collect eggs.

quests.name: Echoes of Paranoia
quests.description:
Alexander Stones 
Westwind Woods, Old Quarry overlooking platform.

Save the hostages in the Westwind Quarry from the Ravager.

quests.name: Eight Legged Freaks
quests.description:
Ophelia Voss
Riverrise, Bench behind the alchemy.

Search for spiders south in the Ripplecrop Fields

quests.name: Breaking the Chains
quests.description:
Marigold Thornbuckle
Goldenfield, Edge farm.

Grab the smoker from near 'Lil Timmy and head north across the field to the hive. Use the smoker on the hive, retrieve the bottle and bring it back.

goals.description: Take the toy out of the hive.

quests.name: Tides of Vengeance
quests.description:
Mariel Venomtail
Windreach Woods, Mermaid Lake

Search the Hunter Camp to the east for the pages.

quests.name: Guarding Fortunes
quests.description: Themis Windreach Woods, Fort. Kill some Dendroid Scouts around the forest.

quests.name: Heartbreak waters
quests.description:
Mariel Venomtail
Windrach Woods, Mermaid Lake.

Find Ivie Clarkson in Goldenfield.

quests.name: Unsavory Evidence
quests.description:
Gusto Grubhunter
Windstone Village, Guard's place: south west.

Head south into the woods. The abandoned house is past the railroad tracks.

quests.name: A Fortune Forewarned
quests.description:
Reyalp
Riverrise, City Enter 1 after the bridge.

Gather these rare materials from veins, bushes and trees around the area!

quests.name: A Nutty Situation
quests.description:
Barkley Beats
Riverrise, City Center.

Use your cooking skill to bake some chokwalatte.

quests.name: Ancient Artifacts
quests.description:
Old Man Zephyr
Riverrise, City Center.

Look closely around the area for these objects.

quests.name: Cigar Tales with Grizzly O'Brien
quests.description:
Grizzly O'Brien
Riverrise, Left side of the BAR yard.

Find scrags in the Abandoned Village to the south, as well as the Railway Depot and Swamps to the east.

quests.name: Byte's Calling Card Investigation
quests.description:
Cyra "Byte" Kessler
Riverrise, River view.

Search the bar for the hidden cards.

quests.name: Chuckling Intervention
quests.description:
Bob Thurkle
Riverrise, Scene.

Search old bushes for rare Chuckleberry leaves.

goals.description: Return Chuckleberry Leaves to Zazz Blorb

quests.name: Catching Dreams
quests.description:
Pax Voss
Riverrise, Bench behind the alchemy.

Search for spiders south in the Ripplecrop Fields

quests.name: The Matricidal Theory
quests.description:
Zarnok
Riverrise, City Center.

Search the city for a rat.

quests.name: Darkwood Dilemma
quests.description:
Tharkon
Windreach Woods, Fort.

Search for the Captain's body near the Altar north of the Quarry and collect any proof you find.

goals.description: Pick up an item near the corpse as proof of death

quests.name: Copper Snack
quests.description:
Rusty McDrinkit
Riverrise, Alcohol truck.

Head to the Railway Depot south east of Riverrise and find bolts and batteries to feed the recycling machine.

goals.description: Bring delicious liquid to Maverick "Mav" Gritt

quests.name: A Taste to Die For
quests.description:
Gragthar
Riverrise, City Center.

Venture into the Ripplecrop Fields and search abandoned houses for pages of the cookbook.

quests.name: Threading the Dream
quests.description:
Lila Algernon
Riverrise, Scene.

Go to the fields outside Riverrise and kill spiders.

quests.name: Exit Stage Left
quests.description:
Zazz Blorb
Riverrise, Scene.

Head into the Riverrise Fields to find gnats for poison. Locate the quitting papers on the table next to the stage.

goals.description: Return Zazz's Quitting Papers to Soko Uno

quests.name: Explosive Revenge
quests.description:
Maverick "Mav" Gritt
Riverrise, Alcohol truck.

Go to the TNT shop and pick up 5 explosive jugs.

quests.name: Unbottling Mercy
quests.description:
Rufus
Riverrise, Butchery district.

Head to the first field northwest and search for the bottle..

quests.name: Behind Enemy Lines
quests.description:
Trevor Barlow
Windreach Woods, Fort.

Search the captain's trunks around the fort for his Calming Leaves.

quests.name: Rehearsed Sabotage
quests.description:
Blorp Knurt
Riverrise, Scene.

Search the Creeping Marsh to the north, just above the top of the river.

quests.name: The Meat of the Matter
quests.description:
"Zeek" Solomon
Riverrise, Butchery district.

Gather Rawstead Carcass and Grylld Carcass. Some say they're best over a fire.

quests.name: Feeding Frenzy
quests.description:
Max Starchaser
Riverrise, City Center.

Head to the swamps north of the marshes.

quests.name: Funny Bunny
quests.description:
Barkowski
Riverrise, Left side of the BAR yard.

Head to the Creeping Marsh and kill 10 rabbits.

quests.name: The Melody of Misfortune
quests.description:
Bart Blaine
Riverrise, Musical Instrument Shop.

Find Felix and take the horn to him.

quests.name: Unmasking the Impostor
quests.description:
Bob Thurkle
Riverrise, Scene.

Go to the pier on the north east side of town and find the mask.

goals.description: Return Mobius Mask to Bob Thurkle

quests.name: Hidden Menace
quests.description: Trevor Barlow Windreach Woods, Fort. Track down the artifact held by a monstrous entity, kill the monster, and return the artifact to Themis.

goals.description: Retrieve the Artifact from a Boss

quests.name: Thistlebrook's Terrifying Task
quests.description:
Thistlebrook
Riverrise, Bench behind the alchemy.

Complete quests for Pax and Ophelia.

quests.name: The Last Order
quests.description:
Morick Voss
Westwind Woods, Valley of sins infestation.

Search the Valley of Sins for jars and take them to Trevor Barlow back at the fort.

quests.name: Slippery Passage
quests.description:
Chad "Buzz" McNulty
Riverrise, Scene.

Go south of the Ripplecrop Fields to the Train Station. Kill scrags to find a key and save the hostages.

quests.name: Scattered Collectibles
quests.description:
Clyde
Riverrise, Market in old town.

Search Riverrise for all the Trading Cards.

quests.name: Rock and Keg Roll
quests.description:
Lola Vexar
Riverrise, Scene.

Search the bar for the kegs.

goals.description: Collect a Keg of beer green
Collect a Keg of beer blue

quests.name: Strumming Sorrow
quests.description:
Felix
Riverrise, Musical Instrument Shop.

Search the bars around Riverrise for the reciept and return it to Bart.

quests.name: Lucky Love
quests.description:
Zorgalon Na'Reeth
Rivverrise, City Enter 1 after the bridge.

Go east from Riverrise, past the swamp to the forest.

quests.name: Mana Market Resupply
quests.description:
Gimlor
Riverrise, Mana market.

Use your tradeskills to craft mana flasks.

quests.name: A Sharp Donation
quests.description:
Velvet Viper
Riverrise, City Center.

Search the bar for the knives.

quests.name: Law and Order Protocols
quests.description:
Police-Tron 5000
Riverrise, City Center.

Look for the packages around Riverrise.

quests.name: Secrets Beneath
quests.description:
Silas Whitlock
Riverrise, Hidden Chest.

Assist Silas Whitlock in dealing with the Fungus that keeps digging up his buried chest.

quests.name: The Elusive Cheese
quests.description:
Seldon Moor
Riverrise, City Pier 2

Find the post office in Riverrise.

goals.description: Pick up Cheese from the Post Office

quests.name: Exotic Attire Acquisition
quests.description:
Yassma
Riverrise, City Center.

Search the tents behind the bar for these items.

quests.name: The Young Woodraptor Predicament
quests.description:
Ludwig Schatten
Tempest Timberland, near the Hunter camp

Venture into the Westwind Woods to find a Young Woodraptor.
Ludwig Schatten
Tempest Timberland, near the Hunter camp

Ludwig needs your help to hunt a Young Woodraptor in Westwind Woods for his research.

quests.name: Dismantling the Dendroid Guard
quests.description:
Ludwig Schatten
Tempest Timberland, near the Hunter camp

Venture into the Tempest Timberland to find a Dendroid Guard.
Ludwig Schatten
Tempest Timberland, near the Hunter camp

Ludwig tasks you with a dangerous hunt for a Dendroid Guard in the Tempest Timberland.

quests.name: Study of the Wooden Deer
quests.description:
Ludwig Schatten
Tempest Timberland, near the Hunter camp

Embark on a perilous hunt for a Wooden Deer in Windreach Woods for Ludwig's research.
Ludwig Schatten
Tempest Timberland, near the Hunter camp

Venture into the Windreach Woods to find a Wooden Deer.

quests.name: Grimbleton's Great Recipe Hunt
quests.description:
Grimbleton
Riverrise, Alchemy.

Find Triton near the Lake house in Windreach Woods!

quests.name: Clean Up on Bong Island
quests.description:
Queenie Viper
Riverrise, Left side of the BAR yard.

Follow the road north out of town and look for the old house.

quests.name: Herbal Aid
quests.description:
Mary Jane
Steppe, Western fort.

Gather intoxicating flowers from the northwest, past the Westend Village. Return them to Lyra at the Western Fort.

quests.name: Harvesting the Fallen
quests.description:
Mort Decay
Steppe, Northsteppe fort.

Collect armour plates from Brisks for research purposes.

quests.name: Echoes from the Front
quests.description:
Barnaby Thorn
Steppe, Great steppe stronghold.

Help Barnaby gather information by finding Vexina Strider around the Stronghold.
Look for Shawna Steelheart northeast at the Adventurer's Outpost.

quests.name: A Pacifist's Dilemma
quests.description:
Brother Thaddeus
Steppe, Western fort.

Collect crystals from golems from the north for the celebration. Place the crystals in the projectors along the fort walls and speak with Madame Mirage in the Western Fort.

quests.name: Double Trouble
quests.description:
Terrace Tenstone
Steppe, Northeast fort.

Help Terrace by speaking with both the Rodgers' within the Northeast Fort about the draft mix-up.

quests.name: Turning the Tide
quests.description:
The Guardinator
Seppe, Great steppe stronghold.

Assist the Guardinator by eliminating golems in the area. Targets reported northwest near the Great Bones Village.

quests.name: A Brother's Shadow
quests.description:
Gideon Stroud
Steppe, North of the shore of Thousand Bones.

Search for any evidence of Gideon's brother just west of the Arid Canal.

goals.description: Find any traces of Gideon's brother

quests.name: Reluctant Reinforcement
quests.description:
Biff "Dozer" Bromley
Steppe, Central Fort.

Biff "Dozer" Bromley demands that you fulfil the duties of the recruits you scared off. Head west to the Great Steppe Stronghold and Western Fort. The Northsteppe Fort is east from Biff.

quests.name: Proof of Purification
quests.description:
Ludwig Stoncap
Steppe, Dragonbane fort.

Help Ludwig gather ammo northeast past the Candlewick Slums! The mushrooms are directly east of the ammo.

quests.name: Thirst for Understanding
quests.description:
Furr
Steppe, Fisher's camp.

Collect poison from Mantha's explosive remains to assist Furr with his research.

quests.name: Valuable Research
quests.description:
Rancor K'Zar
Steppe, Northsteppe fort.

Help collect valuable items north of the Northeast Fort to the southeast.

quests.name: Proving the Steel
quests.description:
Steel Stan
Steppe, Great Bones.

Gather Lightbearer Badges east outside Great Bones Village, between the roads.

quests.name: Resurrection Research
quests.description:
Madame Mirage
Steppe, Western fort.

Collect Conductive Bones from the Hyena Alpha, Elastic Bands from the Scolopendras. Deliver the items to Zeke Thompson at the Northsteppe Fort to the east.

quests.name: Proving Loyalties
quests.description:
Zor
Steppe, Fisher's camp.

Kill the Ravager Hyena around the area to earn favour with Zor.

quests.name: Quelling the Rage
quests.description: Return to Zor at Fisher's Camp to figure out a solution to the Lightbearer's Artefact.

quests.name: Revival Overdrive
quests.description:
Zeke "Gearhead" Thompson
Steppe, Northsteppe fort.

Collect Charge Particles from defeating nearby golems.

goals.description: Return Charge Particles to Zeke Thompson

quests.name: Neither Rain nor Battlefield
quests.description:
Horace Grumbles
Steppe, near East of Arid canals.

Deliver the letter to Tazara south of the Dragonbane Fort.

quests.name: Allergic to Duty
quests.description:
Mabel Thorn
Steppe, Central Fort.

Help Mabel avoid conscription by gathering allergens between the crossroads and lake north of the Central Fort to prove her condition.

quests.name: A Brother's Trail
quests.description:
Gideon Stroud
Steppe, North of the shore of Thousand Bones.

Following the note's directions, head south west to the coast in search for more evidence of Alaric's disappearance.

goals.description: Return the note eaten by hyenas

quests.name: Digging at the Truth
quests.description:
Shawna Steelheart
Steppe, Adventures outpost.

Search for the journals in their Riverrise homes. Finn and Gareth’s houses are in the northern part of town, while Zelina’s is northeast of town, over the bridge, where the road forks.

quests.name: Deserted Hopes
quests.description:
Roddy
Steppe, Western fort.

Speak with Mary Jane Greenpuff in the Western Fort.

quests.name: Crafting Concerns
quests.description:
Lyra Vex
Steppe, Western fort.

Gather curved pipes around the fort, and assemble the weapon before delivering it to Silas.

goals.description: Build a weapon on the anvil

quests.name: Desert Diplomacy
quests.description:
Tor Drostin
Steppe, Central Fort.

Find Zor by the coastline directly north, at the Fisher's Camp.

quests.name: An Ethical Appetite
quests.description:
Triton
Steppe, near west Lost boats.

Kill some hyenas for Triton nearby. He'll gather the meat later.

quests.name: Salvation from Madness
quests.description:
Zor
Steppe, Fisher's camp.

Search the Great Steppes for the dangerous, wandering Archosaur and slay it for the final artefact piece!
Take the artefact and Archosaur head to Zor at the Fisher’s Camp, or to Tor at the Central Fort. Choose wisely.

goals.description: Piece of Artefact from the Archosaur
Bring piece of artefact to Zor

quests.name: Signal in the Sands
quests.description:
Colt "Muffinman" McGrady
Steppe, Great steppe stronghold.

Help Colt 'Muffinman' McGrady restore the transmission systems northwest by the village, north to the cemetery, and northeast up the road from the slums.

goals.description: Report to Colt McGrady that all towers are operational

quests.name: Sensing the Sands
quests.description:
Xelcor Zinn
Steppe, Northsteppe fort.

Grab four sensors from the fort and place one to the west of the South Winery. Go west and place on the rocky shore of the lake. Head east out of the fort and place one and finally to the south, just off the road.

goals.description: Collect 4 sensors around the northern outpost

quests.name: Sharpening Resolve
quests.description:
Silas Thorne
Steppe, Western fort.

Gather the weapon parts directly north of the Western Fort. When the road turns, continue straight north. Return with the pieces and use the anvil in the Western Fort to construct the new weapon.

goals.description: Build a reinforced weapon on the anvil

quests.name: Silencing the Rumours
quests.description:
Tor Drostin
Steppe, Central Fort.

Help Tor Drostin remove the inflammatory posters causing unrest at the outpost.

quests.name: Shadows Beneath the Sands
quests.description:
Tor Drostin
Steppe, Central Fort.

Head west to the Great Steppes Stronghold and sabotage the fort.

quests.name: Sending the Alert
quests.description:
Colt "Muffinman" McGrady
Steppe, Great steppe stronghold.

Head northwest and find the transmitter south of the Arid Canal, past the lake. The parts are located around the Great Steppe Stronghold.

goals.description: Repair radio transmitter and call to the king

quests.name: Spirited Away
quests.description:
Dr. Queenie
Steppe, Northsteppe fort.

Fetch liquor from the ruins to the northeast near the swamp line.

quests.name: Secrets of the Invaders
quests.description:
Furr
Steppe, Fisher's camp.

Help Furr understand the human invaders by collecting their valuables within the Adventurer's Outpost.

quests.name: Desert Data Dilemma
quests.description:
Dr Queenie
Steppe, Northsteppe fort.

Help Dr Queenie obtain ecological research data from HPPY-01 northeast at the Junkyard slumss, past the South Winery.

goals.description: Get 6 data from the research drone group (talk with bshl-02, grmp-07, dopy-03, snzy-04, slpy-05, hppy-01)

quests.name: Desert Decryption
quests.description:
Mort Decay
Steppe, Northsteppe fort.

Help Mort Decay retrieve mysterious artefacts. Collect them to the southeast, between the Northeast Fort and the Eastern-Marsh Fort.

quests.name: Secrets Unearthed
quests.description:
Colt "Muffinman" McGrady
Steppe, Great steppe stronghold.

Help Colt "Muffinman" McGrady by finding the Spellbreaker Amulet to the north in the Candlewick Slums. After, head southwest to find the hidden stash.

goals.description: Use the Spellbreaker Amulet to see caches

quests.name: Lost and Found
quests.description:
Zor
Steppe, Fisher's camp.

Search for broken fragments of the artefact east along the shoreline, southeast of Crystal Cave.

quests.name: The Role of a Lifetime
quests.description:
Slick Shady
Steppe, Coal Village.

Help Slick Shady by killing small Archeosaurs around different camps while he finds the artefact's location.

quests.name: Magnetic Intentions
quests.description:
GRMP-07
Steppe, Junkyard slumss.

Collect magnets from Enriched and Ancient veins nearby for GRMP-07 using the Ore Extractor.

goals.description: Extract magnets from ore veins using a device

quests.name: Mine Over Matter
quests.description:
Greta Grubb
Steppe, Western fort.

Head north to plant land mines to defend against enemy forces. Just south of the Coal Village.

goals.description: Be careful around mines (you have to sneak around the activated mines), place 7 landmines around the area

quests.name: Desert Denial
quests.description:
Mabel Thorn
Steppe, Central Fort.

Help Mabel Thorn gather evidence from the predatory plants near the border.

goals.description: Use the "Bramble dust" on Thornback Creepers
Extract "Anomalous plant" from the Leaf Queen

quests.name: Bearing Light
quests.description:
Barnaby Thorn
Steppe, Great steppe stronghold.

Assist The Guardinator and Jennifer around the stronghold. Terrace was sent east to the Northeast Fort, you’ll find him there.
Martha "Big Mamma" Potterson  
Goldenfield, near Welfare kitchen  

Martha wants you to put the trade skills you learned to work by helping various people around the village.

quests.name: Beacon of Hope
quests.description:
Kira
Steppe, Fisher's Camp.

Collect fuses on the island northeast of Fisher's Camp and scattered around Smugglers Island and the several small islands that surround it. Afterwards, light torches along the beach, starting east of Fisher's Camp, down to the north of Silent Village.

goals.description: Light the signal torches along the riverbank

quests.name: A Second Chance
quests.description:
Kira
Steppe, Fisher's camp.

Kill hyenas and collect their blood for Kira. Mark fallen brothers by anomaly to the south-east.

quests.name: Artifact of Fury
quests.description:
Zor
Steppe, Fisher's camp.

Find Slick Shady in Coal Village to the southwest of the Arid Canal.

quests.name: The Betrayer's Blade
quests.description:
Shawna Steelheart
Steppe, Adventures outpost.

Search the battlefield, west down the road of the Great Steppe Cemetery and look for any clues.

goals.description: Find some clues on the battlefield
Return the Broken Bayonet to Zelina Ironweave

quests.name: The Draft Dodger's Dilemma
quests.description:
Lenny
Steppe, Central Fort.

Help Lenny avoid the draft by retrieving the smut film from his lost camera.

goals.description: Open the safe and take the film

quests.name: Unsettling Return
quests.description:
Gareth Rucker
Steppe, Adventures outpost.

Assist Gareth with enchanting the mysterious artefact at the Quarran Altar Obelisk. Head north to the Greatsteppe Cemetery. After enchanting the artefact, take it to Barnaby for inspection.
Take the artefact to Colt in the Great Steppe Stronghold. He may know more about it.

goals.description: Show the artefact to Barnaby Thorn

quests.name: The Desert's Secret
quests.description:
HPPY-01
Steppe, Junkyard slumss.

Collect data from one of the three anomalies along the northern coast. They have been seen south of Fisher's Camp, to all the way east past the Hillside Well.

quests.name: Substances of Suspicion
quests.description:
Xelcor Zinn
Steppe, Northsteppe fort.

Collect scolopendra hormones from creatures outside the fort.

quests.name: Sunburnt Escape
quests.description:
Nud-E Leroy
Steppe, near Skeleton Cave.

Defeat Leaf Dragons around the Steppe for leaf extract. Take the extract near Nud-E Leroy and mix it up into burn relief ointment for him.

quests.name: Stamp of Peace
quests.description:
Tor Drostin
Steppe, Central Fort.

Search for the notary northeast at the Winery.
Search for the notary northeast at the Silver Mine.

goals.description: Find a clue about the notarys location

quests.name: The Blade's Dilemma
quests.description:
Daxton Vance
Steppe, Western fort.

Search for the Westend Village northwest and look for the cursed sword. Follow to the road north to the crossroads, then head west to the village.

quests.name: Accords and Accidents
quests.description:
HPPY-01
Steppe, Junkyard slumss.

Return the data to Dr. Queenie south at the Northsteppe Fort.

goals.description: Deliver HPPY-01's research data to Dr. Queenie

quests.name: The Great Pretender
quests.description:
Slick Shady
Steppe, Coal Village.

Hunt down the wandering Lizard Draco and slay it, making Slick Shady look like a hero.
Seaonna
Windreach Woods, Mermaid Lake

Slay the leaf monsters in the forest and gather Verdant Leaves.

quests.name: Defectors' Round-up
quests.description:
Roddy
Steppe, Western fort.

Daxton and Greta are around the fort. Nud-E Leroy is northwest near Skeleton Cave on the beach. Triton is around the Lost Boats north of the Skeleton Cave and Slick Shady is at Coal Village to the north. You can find Horace around the Arid Canal, northeast of Coal Village.

quests.name: Unearthing the Truth
quests.description:
Zor
Steppe, Fisher's camp.

Search south, past the anomaly for the fallen Lightbearer envoy near the road.
No note on body? Must be nearby. Maybe left at drop point… Look at lake to Northwest.

goals.description: Find the corpse of the light-bearer with the hidden message.

quests.name: A Quiet Disposal
quests.description:
Finn Hawthorne
Steppe, Adventures outpost.

Head north of the outpost near the anomaly for Shroomageddon. Gather a Septic Seed from scolopendras. Finally, return to the Adventurer's Outpost and use the grinder to finish the drink.

goals.description: Collect Septic Seed from the scolopendra
Use a device to obtain Mindplague Essence

quests.name: Brotherly Loss
quests.description:
Gideon Stroud
Steppe, North of the shore of Thousand Bones.

Follow the clues from the note and head towards the western coast, past Coal Village. Alaric was last seen in this area.

goals.description: Get proof of death of brother Gideon

quests.name: Blitz's Escape Clause
quests.description:
Blitz Hyperstorm
Steppe, Central Fort.

Follow Blitz's trail of crushed cans south into the forest. His contract should be at the end of the trail.

goals.description: Find Blitz's contract and deliver it to Blitz

quests.name: Call to Arms
quests.description:
Assist Biff "Dozer" Bromley in preparing the recruits around the Central Fort for the upcoming expedition.
 
Biff "Dozer" Bromley  
Steppe, Central Fort.

Follow the road north into the Steppes to the Central Fort where you will find Biff "Dozer" Bromley.

quests.name: Beacon of Confidence
quests.description:
Zeke "Gearhead" Thompson
Steppe, Northsteppe fort.

Find Roddy west at the Western Fort to share the news.

quests.name: A Skullful of Solace
quests.description:
SLPY-05
Steppe, Junkyard slumss.

Defeat golems and use the mechanical board reader to examine their contents.

quests.name: Fragments of Fury
quests.description:
Slick Shady
Steppe, Coal Village.

Head to the very north-west of the Silent Mountains to find the Shoreline Ruins, just south of the large island.

quests.name: Flowers for Friendship
quests.description:
BSHL-02
Steppe, Junkyard slumss.

Collect desert flowers. Follow the road northeast, nearly to the coastline. There you will find the flowers.

quests.name: Furnishing the Future
quests.description:
HPPY-01
Steppe, Junkyard slumss.

Help HPPY-01 salvage furniture around the outpost to make the bots' outpost more welcoming.

goals.description: Return pieces of furniture to HPPY

quests.name: Unveiling the Hidden Truth
quests.description:
Jennifer Davyna
Steppe, Great steppe stronghold.

Search for an abandoned house northwest by the Great Bones Village that contains evidence of a conspiracy.

goals.description: Find a way to unlock the door in the house.
Take the secret item from the house

quests.name: Juice for the Journey
quests.description:
Blitz Hyperstorm
Steppe, Central Fort.

Help Blitz gather Sparkleaf Extract from the supply crates nearby so he can brew more Zap Juice.

quests.name: Lights, Camera, Action!
quests.description:
Lenny
Steppe, Central Fort.

Help Lenny capture film of you killing hyenas in the Steppes for his film, avoiding any explosions.

quests.name: Echoes in the Sand
quests.description:
DOPY-03
Steppe, Junkyard slumss.

Help DOPY-03 retrieve a lost lightbearer's beacon from a Hyena in the northern desert.

quests.name: Evidence in the Shadows
quests.description:
Tor Drostin
Steppe, Central Fort.

Search the Great Steppes Stronghold to the west for any evidence that may uncover the secret plan.

quests.name: Unearthing Obsession
quests.description:
Alex "Hooty" Howizer
Steppe, Great steppe stronghold.

Find the artefact north between the Great Steppe Cemetery and the lake. If repairs are needed, head south of its location for artefact parts.

goals.description: Find the parts of the artefact
Use an artefact to repair it

quests.name: Echoes of Atonement
quests.description:
Kira
Steppe, Fisher's camp.

Follow the coastline to the north west corner of the Silent Mountains. There you will find the lost altar to experience death for yourself.

goals.description: Take the dagger from the altar

quests.name: Echoes of the Feral Artifact
quests.description:
Zor
Steppe, Fisher's camp.

Follow the coastline west in search of an island, just northwest of the Lost Altar. Gideon should be residing on it.

quests.name: Energised Spirits
quests.description:
Tor Drostin  
Steppe, Central Fort.  

Search for the ale to the northeast. You'll find the North Winery, northwest of the Adventurer's Outpost.

goals.description: Throw the ingredients into the barrel of ale near Tor

quests.name: Guarding Shadows
quests.description:
Zelina Ironweave
Steppe, Adventures outpost.

Help Zelina by finding the lost gun southwest in the Candlewick Slums. Finn can be found around the Adventurer's Outpost.

quests.name: Heartbeat of the Party
quests.description:
Zibb "The Zest" Throttlebreech
Riverrise, Left side of the BAR yard.

Find turtles around the waters of Riverrise.

quests.name: Guilt and Gears
quests.description:
Flint Thistlewick
Steppe, Great steppe stronghold.

Help Flint Thistlewick repair his steam-powered armour by collecting small gears from Small Golems.

quests.name: Allergy-Free Flora
quests.description:
SNZY-04
Steppe, Junkyard slumss.

Help SNZY-04 collect rare desert plant samples north along the northern coastline. Take the samples near the Hillside Well northwest of SNZY-04 , just short of the sandy beach and use the bio-machine.

goals.description: Collect 3 specimens from Blue Desert Blooms
Collect 2 specimens from Spiky Red Cacti
Use the bio-machine to process the samples

quests.name: A Bitter Brew
quests.description:
Furr
Steppe, Fisher's camp.

Deliver poison to the water reservoir south-west of the Great Steppe Stronghold.

goals.description: Poison the water in the barrel

quests.name: Hangover Helper
quests.description:
Dr. Queenie
Steppe, Northsteppe fort.

Help Dr. Queenie recover from her hangover by gathering ingredients nearby for her hangover.

goals.description: Return sugar and vodka to Queenie

quests.name: Kill the maker
quests.description:
QUEST-O-TRON 
Windreach Woods, Camp near the shrine.

Venture to the Destroyed Bridge in the Windreach Woods, then search the crashed spaceship. Search trees around Goldenfield and finally stop at the Book Stop for Pappy's items.
